stemHtml: Per Part-FCL, an IR(A) applicant must hold a PPL(A) with night qualification (if using IR at night) or CPL(A), and have completed at least 50 hours...

options.a: cross-country PIC time in aeroplanes or helicopters, of which at least 10 in the relevant category.
options.c: cross-country time as pilot (not necessarily PIC).
options.d: instructional time as student PIC of aeroplanes.
